question:
Which of the following is a potential insider threat indicator?
(INSIDER THREAT)
canonical_answer:
1) Unusual interest in classified information.

2) Difficult life circumstances, such as death of spouse.

appears_in.title: Navy Cyber Awareness Challenge 2023
appears_in.answer: Ensure there are no identifiable landmarks visible in any photos taken in a work setting that you post.
